reviews.review_description:
Been playing since forever ago. With the new update it feels like a game, and not a buggy mess.
  Glad for it. There's really not a game like this in Vr. Sure you have GRO(which got me back to this game) then seen the update. Im loving the openness and you have new animals. One thing I would love to be added, I want to ride that bicycle. Lol.

***sooo upset you abandoned the game! I am dying to play an amazing farming game and there is none like harvest vr, even in its buggy basic, crap graphic state it's better than any other out there, just craving a good farming game and nobody is making one. *****


Such a nice game and loads to do! For improvement I would say seated play option, as I have to keep adjusting my height in settings and my floor boundary! 
Please update this game with better graphics, and multiplayer mode, I'd definitely buy a paid version. You are onto something here if only devs would finish the game ☹️ Also when I go home to save sometimes the screen goes black and I'm stuck hearing the game not seeing anything and having to turn it off.. Losing all my progress that day. You need a better save function tbh.
And if players don't know how to bake etc you need to work on the tutorials too.

reviews.review_title: I HAVE BEEN PLAYING THIS FOR YEARS
reviews.review_description: I like the game a lot but there are some buggs but its not that bad. And i relly which it had multiplayer so i can play with friends. But over all this game is pritty good 👍
Same I started playing again and it’s amazing btw mining is the best strat for gold and get the mushrooms in the caves I didn’t know you could pick them up till 9 days into playing.
I used to play this game than while scrolling through my library I saw it and downloaded it now I'm playing it and it is super fun if you like farming and relaxing games try this.
If you leave the seed shop with the seeds in your hand they dissapear and you lose all your money and seeds so fix your sped game

The trailer was nice but its confusing once in the game. Moving around is time consuming, makes gather tools repetitive. Tools glitch threw environment and become stuck in characters body. Needs work, but i like the idea they were shooting for when making this game. Will check in when later updates come about.
Would pay $10 but its free AND fun??? lucky

I love the fact that I can play this alone. Not that I don’t like people but this game is more intimate than rushing around with other players. The only thing I dislike is it is hard making the money at first but I found a good way after getting the pickax. Mining is a money maker. Thank you
This game is just the best (I have nothing else to say)👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁
Eve been thinking of this game non stop and im so happy it exist. Its the best game ever

I love it! I usally have internet problems and i found the right game for me! 

Suggestion:
-Add a multiplayer mode where you can allow players to make a private code and others can join
-More fruits,Animals, and props and more!!
-Jump mechanic (the reason i say that is because whenever i see a tree that i can cut down, its sometimes on a hill but i cant jump though.

Please and thank you!❤️
-Urshadow004

Youtube channel: 
Urshadow004
I love this game but can you fix chickens
Wow I just love the ways I can make money and have fun
Some things I can’t figure out but it’s really fun if you like realistic working games has a mining system and your able to chop down trees take care of animals grow your vegetables and fruits.
hard control, no hints, a lot is not clear
I love the game but my game is a bit bugged I bought a chicken but it did not appear on my ranch please tell me what I did wrong

reviews.review_title: For a free game, this is awesome.
reviews.review_description: This beats every other free game I have played on my oculus so far. If this had multiplayer, I would play it for hours.

I can't figure out how to find recipes! And once i do, what is the best thing to cook for best money value.
Also, we really need a 'farm visit' capability. The owner of the farm can choose permissions for the visitor to have access to (money, tools etc.) and allow a friend to potentially help, it just spectate and get an idea for their own farm.
I played it for a hour then I Uninstalld it and it reinstall idk I'd this is a bug which meta or the game is someone could tell me do it
Fun game and not hard to get good at but I just wish that every time you walk in to your house or a different location you screen doesn’t go black

This could easily be the leading game in its category. . . and yes, I do think this will be a category. It's an obvious choice for developers. 

But I don't think it's there yet - which I'm sure is why it's still free, which is a good plan. . . 

The physics and controls are a bit weird, and traveling by teleport with a tunnel vision fade in/out gave me a headache. It needs real-time walking and scrolling with a teleport option. 

Multiple choice conversations has Zelda vibes but ai voice recognition free-style discussions should happen in the future. 

I'm going to revisit this game later, after a few updaes. My family is big "Hay Day" fans and I think this could be the VR version of that at some point.

It's not worth mentioning the graphics. They are basic shapes but I'm sure that's intentional while the developers are working on it. My guess is that textures will follow eventually. 

Great job so far. I'm interested in seeing a completed version.

I was looking for a simple farming game on my new quest 3, I made profile for real time, but even after watering my 6 plants nothing it said 1 day it would be ready it's been like 4 now! Also just to see something I made another profile this time with gametime so I did everything the same and went to "sleep" for the next day, still not done! I see little growth from seed "ground" then a very small sprout, but that's it. 
Please what am I doing wrong? Only been making money going to beach and collecting coconuts and shells but it's only gotten me to like $600 but everything I need is expensive! 
Again love it but how to grow what u planted til ready to harvest????
This is a really fun game
They could add multiplayer it would be way funnier with my friends
Whenever I launch up the game, I can’t interact with the menu. I’ve looked stuff up online, and there is nothing to my knowledge that can fix this. Please fix!

developer_response.body: Hi! That means your save file is broken. You can contact us in the discord to figure out whats the issue for you.

reviews.review_title: This Isn't Like Harvest Moon VR!😭
reviews.review_description: First off, I should have a boy character, not a girl character. Secondly, the force does not work in this game. Thirdly, it does not feel like Harvest Moon VR. There is no Frozen Lake Mine, no Other Natural Foods, and no Herbs hidden along the pathway.

reviews.review_title: Best survival game I’ve seen in a while
reviews.review_description:
Introductions and updates

Let me start off by saying this game is a 10/10. The graphics are well made and the art style is just perfect! The maps are very realistic but simple so it still gives you that fun vibe, I really love this game, but there are a few things that would be good to have in the future.


Animal upgrade

The animals are very well made aswell as having a large variety of animals to choose from, but there is a barn just sitting next to the cows? Its not doing much just being a bit of scenery. So why not make it useful! I would really love a horse option for the barns and perhaps you could make them rideable? I don’t know just a thought I guess.


Farming

There are a lot of fruit and vegetable options to make and plant, but it is kind of annoying to have to reach so far down just to pick the plants. So maybe add an option to change your height up and down. And yes I know there is many ways to fix this but an official fix would be great!


Total review 

And that is all! I hope you will see this review as it would be much appreciated and even better for you to actually take my suggestions and make them official! But that is my entire review on this game, I hope you have a great day/night. Farewell!
Even though it is free it is a waste of space

I had some good expectations for this game. When I tried to press next in the tutorial it wouldn’t let me, even though I did what the tutorial told me to do. I restarted the game and decided to skip the tutorial and figure the game on my own. When I finally went inside, the graphics were terrible and so blurry. I went to graphics settings and changed the render scale higher. As soon as I did that, the whole game started to glitch out and was blinking. As if that wasn’t bad enough, the game then froze my whole quest 2. Thankfully it restated itself after a while. I know it’s a game in app lab, but this really needs to be fixed. Once you reply to me and tell me it is fixed, I will try the game again and will gladly update my review.

It was good at first but when i clicked a button in settings it froze my oculus so bad it broke it
P.s brayden. Fix your dumb game

Supper fun, fishing, painting, harvesting, cooking, and a lot more.  Really loving living in this world.  I get lost in there for hours at a time 😁😃  This game just keeps getting better and better.  Great game, Great job to the developer.

reviews.review_title: Can’t Teleport On Quest 1 touch controll
reviews.review_description: This game won’t let me teleport or even use the walking with the joystick. If I can get some help or feedback to teleport I will gladly take that information.

Im not sure why the good reviews, but the tutorial wont let you hit next after doing what it tells you and it takes a tutorial to figure the game out.

The action of picking tools up is off (holds things pretty far away from where your hands are and the orientation of tge tool is completely.... Loopy), and it is hard to find what you're supposed to do to start off (which maybe isnt a problem if the tutorial worked)

The keyboard is glitchy, it didn't save the name I put in, and all of the text is too thin and kinda shimmers in and out of exsistance so it's hard to read anything.
I’ve lost so much progress that I feel that this game NEEDS an auto save feature

reviews.review_title: Well made so far but 1 issue
reviews.review_description: So the game is very well made i but there is 1 problem when I go into the mine it just kicks me out I have no idea what it is so I don’t know if I need something because I have a pickaxe. Plz tell me what to do maybe?

This s one a great game honestly I don’t know how such a simple game cane just be so good, second if your playing I real time heres some tips for starting out one plant seeds right Away and water them, second sell everything mushrooms sell, coconuts nuts Sell, wood SELL, if u can sell it do it, third the first tools you should get is the fishing rod then the axe because you sell wood and fish and that’s really all the tips I got.

the first thing I heard about this game was that it was being developed by two people so I ignored getting it. After a bit of being bored with my super fast paced games (pavlov echo arena and others)  I wanted something slower so I asked my friends for slow games like animal crossing for oculus and everyone recommended this game as the first thing they said after a lot of hesitation because of the short amount of people working on it I downloaded it and tried it out. THIS IS AMAZING an open world vr game to spend days playing and maxing out. If you like animal crossing play this right now! Also I recommend making the game go by real time

reviews.review_title: A fun novelty for Stardew or AC fans
reviews.review_description: Harvest VR is very similar to something like Stardew Valley, it has most of the same mechanics, but in VR. I haven’t played for that long, but it’s enjoyable. The biggest thing for me is that it lacks character when put against the games I compared it to, but as far as I can tell it’s one of the better free games on the Quest. I just don’t see it replacing my ultra-modded Stardew Valley save any time soon.

I really enjoy playing this game, you can totally lose track of time! Very relaxing, it can help you get distracted from everyday problems. I like the archery game and climbing in the trees or in the mine. If i could change something in this game it would be the characters (the ones selling stuff in the stores) because they are kinda ugly. Other than that, the graphs are simple and nice. 5 stars!
